fixReviewSummary.addressesBlockingIssue: CLI flag overrides (--quality, --views, --audio-only, --format) were applied after initClient() validated config, allowing invalid values to bypass validation and reach remote API calls
fixReviewSummary.resolutionDetails: The fix adds applyAndValidateFlags() which validates quality (144/450/720), views (first/second/both/left/right), and audioFormat (mp3/m4a/aac/opus) immediately after CLI flag overrides are applied, before any download-related remote calls. This satisfies VAL-CLI-007 and VAL-CLI-011. The non-blocking views inconsistency is also resolved by accepting both canonical and legacy values.
